hero.title: Mangalam Banquet Hall & Hotel
hero.subtitle: Where every celebration becomes a cherished memory. Premium banquet halls and comfortable rooms in the heart of Bettiah.

about: Mangalam Banquet Hall & Hotel is Bettiah's premier destination for weddings, receptions, conferences, and celebrations. With elegant indoor halls, a sprawling outdoor lawn, and 18 well-appointed rooms, we bring together comfort and grandeur under one roof. Our dedicated team ensures every event is flawless — from intimate gatherings to grand weddings with over 1,000 guests.

eventTypes.name: Weddings & Receptions
eventTypes.description: Create the wedding of your dreams in our beautifully decorated halls or under the stars in our grand lawn. We handle everything from décor to catering.

eventTypes.name: Corporate Events
eventTypes.description: Host professional conferences, seminars, and corporate gatherings in our well-equipped halls with modern amenities.

eventTypes.name: Birthday & Anniversaries
eventTypes.description: Celebrate milestones with your loved ones in our intimate yet spacious venues, perfect for parties of all sizes.

eventTypes.name: Social Gatherings
eventTypes.description: From religious ceremonies to community events, our versatile halls adapt to every occasion with ease.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: Mangalam made our daughter's wedding reception absolutely perfect. The Grand Hall was beautifully decorated and the staff was incredibly attentive.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Excellent venue for our annual company seminar. The Royal Hall had all the amenities we needed. Very professional service.

testimonials.name: Amit Verma
testimonials.text: Hosted my son's first birthday here. The Celebration Hall was perfect for our 200 guests. Great food and friendly staff!

contactInfo.address: Ward No 37, Bettiah, West Champaran, Bihar - 845438
